headline: Did ADM’s US$103 Million Decatur Upgrade Just Reframe Its Next-Generation Ag Processing Narrative?
summary: Earlier in June 2026, Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker announced that Archer-Daniels-Midland will invest US$103 million to modernize its Decatur, Illinois corn and soybean processing complex, creating 50 new full-time jobs and retaining more than 1,000 existing roles. This upgrade of one of the world’s largest integrated agricultural processing hubs underscores ADM’s push toward more advanced, technology-driven production in next-generation agriculture and food processing. With this...
